case_title: MATEO AGUILAR VS. JENE WONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, MATEO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MATEO AGUILAR IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS JENE AND LINDA WONG AND WERE ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CANTONESE INTERPRETER JAMES PAN. MR. PAN WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURTROOM CLERK R.SAHATJIAN. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,400.00 FILED BY AGUILAR, MATEO AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JENE WONG, LINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
